recommendations.title: An Ordinary Case
recommendations.overview: Jean Monier is a disillusioned lawyer, appointed to defend Nicolas Milik, a man accused of murdering his wife. While everything points to his guilt, Monier takes up the case, convinced of his innocence.

recommendations.title: Mad Mom

recommendations.title: Fanny and Alexander

recommendations.title: Bright Star

recommendations.title: The Other Woman

recommendations.title: The Mambo Kings
recommendations.overview: The Mambo Kings tells the story of César and Nestor Castillo, brothers and aspiring musicians who flee from Cuba to America in search of the American Dream.
